title: Tender Thai-Style Chicken Wings
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on traditional wings, inspired by Thai cuisine. Serve with a side of steamed vegetables for a well-rounded meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut oil, Thai red curry paste, fish sauce, brown sugar, and soy sauce.
Add the chicken wings to the marinade and toss to coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the wings from the marinade and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in 1-2 tablespoons of water to create a sauce.
Toss the baked wings in the sauce and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions, if desired.
